name: EnVault
description: EnVault — lightweight environment variable manager for developer teams and CI/CD.

seo.title: EnVault — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: EnVault: EnVault — lightweight environment variable manager for developer teams and CI/CD.

when_to_use: Team environment variable sync without plaintext sharing
Lightweight CI/CD secret injection for small dev teams
Multi-environment config management across staging and prod
Developer onboarding automation with pre-loaded env sets
Audit trail for environment variable access and changes

pros: Lightweight env var manager for small teams
Aims at the common CI/CD secrets pain point
cons: Not a full vault with leasing or PKI
review.verdict: Decent .env sync for small teams, but hard to bet your secrets stack on a niche vendor.
review.best_for: Indie teams needing simple shared env vars across dev and CI.
review.not_for: Enterprises needing dynamic secrets, PKI, or compliance features.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
